items.title: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE:JPM) Enhances United Cards With Benefits Worth Over US$2,000
items.description: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE:JPM) saw a price move of 3% over the past week, during which it introduced the United Family of Cards alongside United Airlines, enhancing benefits for MileagePlus members. This launch positions Chase to attract more cardholders with enticing travel rewards and bonuses, showcasing its ongoing partnership with United. Meanwhile, the broader market reflected modest optimism as reports surfaced about potential reductions in upcoming Trump administration tariffs, contributing...

items.title: Shares of financial stocks are trading higher amid overall market strength on reports of potentially narrowed or targeted tariffs, which may be easing investor concerns.
JPMorgan rebrands DEI, leaves Net-Zero Asset Managers initiative
items.description: The bank said it will swap “equity” for “opportunity” in its DEI policy and that it left NZAM due to the net-zero group’s operational pause.
